description_long: This large bungalow features a complex arrangement of steeply pitched gable roofs, multiple wings, and several attached structures, including a garage and greenhouse. The main building is surrounded by patios, decks, and a swimming pool, with a paved driveway leading to the garage. The exterior walls are finished in a dark color, contrasting with the lighter roof surfaces. There are numerous windows of varying sizes, some grouped and others spaced apart, providing ample natural light. The property includes landscaped areas, a small outbuilding, and a fenced garden section. The overall design blends modern and traditional bungalow elements, with a focus on spaciousness and outdoor amenities.
description: A sprawling bungalow with steep gable roofs, multiple wings, attached garage, greenhouse, patios, and landscaped grounds. The exterior is dark with contrasting light roofs and numerous windows.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the main facade with multiple gable roofs, patios, a swimming pool, and the driveway leading to the garage.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the front entrance, greenhouse, and landscaped garden area, with the garage prominently in the foreground.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the bungalow, showing the back patios, additional outbuildings, and the full extent of the roof structure.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the side and rear wings, with visible decks, the greenhouse, and the garden area set apart from the main building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and spaced windows
